words.meaning: To share content on social media
words.exampleSentence: I will post my vacation photos on Facebook.

words.meaning: To show approval for a post
words.exampleSentence: She got over a hundred likes on her photo.

words.meaning: To repost someone else's content
words.exampleSentence: Please share this post with your friends.

words.meaning: A response or remark on a post
words.exampleSentence: Leave a comment below the video.

words.meaning: Someone who subscribes to your updates
words.exampleSentence: She has over ten thousand followers on Instagram.

words.meaning: Popular or widely discussed at a given time
words.exampleSentence: That hashtag is trending worldwide.

words.meaning: An alert about new activity
words.exampleSentence: I got a notification about your comment.

words.meaning: A word or phrase preceded by # to group posts
words.exampleSentence: Use the hashtag #travel to reach more people.

words.meaning: A person who affects others' opinions on social media
words.exampleSentence: The influencer promoted the new product.

words.meaning: The amount of interaction a post receives
words.exampleSentence: High engagement means more likes and comments.

words.meaning: Content that spreads extremely quickly
words.exampleSentence: The video went viral overnight.

words.meaning: Direct Message — a private message
words.exampleSentence: Send me a DM if you have any questions.

words.meaning: To mention someone in a post or photo
words.exampleSentence: Tag your friends in the comments.

words.meaning: A temporary photo or video that disappears after 24 hours
words.exampleSentence: I posted a story about my day at the beach.

words.meaning: A stream of posts from accounts you follow
words.exampleSentence: Your feed shows updates from your friends.

words.meaning: A username on social media
words.exampleSentence: My Instagram handle is @travel_diaries.

words.meaning: A short description on a profile page
words.exampleSentence: Update your bio to tell people about yourself.

words.meaning: For You Page — a personalized feed on TikTok
words.exampleSentence: My video got on the FYP and went viral.

words.meaning: An effect applied to photos or videos
words.exampleSentence: She used a vintage filter on her photo.

words.meaning: To remove someone from your friend list
words.exampleSentence: He unfriended me after our argument.

words.meaning: To prevent someone from seeing your content
words.exampleSentence: I had to block that spam account.

words.meaning: To stop seeing someone's posts without unfollowing
words.exampleSentence: I muted her stories because she posts too often.

words.meaning: To broadcast live video
words.exampleSentence: She will stream her concert on YouTube.

words.meaning: To follow a channel for regular updates
words.exampleSentence: Please subscribe to my channel.

words.meaning: A blue checkmark confirming a real account
words.exampleSentence: His account has a verified blue badge.
